lines.speaker: Tamble
lines.text: Aluft Aloft is a bustling new business, here in the Gnome restaurant. We're getting food orders all the time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any jobs then?

lines.speaker: Tamble
lines.text: If you want to get a job, talk to Aluft Gianne jnr. I'm sure he has plenty.
